title: For RHEL: tests need to be updated to use FQINs
body: All the buildah tests use shortnames: alpine, busybox, fedora. This is not going to work on RHEL any more. This is going to be super-tedious to fix.

comments.body: Why are they not going to work.  Docker.io was added back to registries.conf.
I'm seeing gating-test failures. Perhaps the re-addition of docker.io hasn't made its way into this particular build. Will close this but keep an eye on future builds.
